name: Vegetable Fritters (Pakora)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the chickpea flour, unbleached all-purpose flour, baking soda, cayenne pepper, 1 1/4 cups cold water, lemon juice, cumin powder, coriander powder, turmeric, and sea salt. Mix well to form a smooth batter.
2. Heat oil in a large skillet or deep fryer to about 350°F (175°C).
3. Dip each vegetable into the batter, ensuring they are fully coated.
4. Carefully lower the vegetables into the hot oil using a slotted spoon.
5. Cook, turning occasionally, until golden brown and crispy, about 5 minutes per side.
6. Remove the fritters with the slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
7. Keep the cooked fritters warm in an oven set to around 200°F (95°C) while cooking the remaining vegetables.
